business_context.analysis_summary: This is an upscale hotel where guests praise staff friendliness, location, and amenities, but express concerns about room allocation, facility management, pricing transparency, and inconsistent service resolution.

pain_clusters.root_cause: Maintenance failed to resolve the AC issue, leading to discomfort and poor sleep.
supporting_reviews: Air conditioning in our room was broken. Maintenance came twice and said it was fixed but it was still warm at night. We did not sleep well for the first two nights.
WiFi password was wrong on the card left in the room. Took 40 minutes and three calls to reception to get the correct one. Basic amenity, should work from the moment you arrive.
Noise from the street was terrible. We were on the third floor and could hear everything until 2am. The hotel should warn guests about this when allocating rooms.

pain_clusters.root_cause: Booking app instability and unresponsive phone support lead to missed appointment opportunities.
supporting_reviews: The spa was excellent but getting an appointment was nearly impossible. The booking app kept crashing and when I called nobody answered. By the time I got through most slots were gone.
We booked a sea-view room but were given a room overlooking the car park. When I complained the receptionist said nothing was available. We paid a premium for a view we never got.
Late checkout was refused even though the hotel was clearly not busy. We had an evening flight and had to sit in the lobby for four hours with our luggage. Very uncomfortable.
Mini bar prices are outrageous. 18 dollars for a small bottle of water. No mention of this anywhere. Families travelling with kids will be in for a nasty surprise on checkout.

recommendations.recommendation: Implement a proactive AC maintenance schedule and empower front desk to offer immediate room changes when AC issues are reported.
recommendations.expected_impact: Reduces guest discomfort, improves sleep quality, and prevents negative reviews related to in-room experience.
recommendations.evidence: "Maintenance failed to resolve the AC issue, leading to discomfort and poor sleep."

recommendations.recommendation: Upgrade booking app infrastructure and introduce a callback system for phone support to ensure no missed appointment opportunities.
recommendations.expected_impact: Increases successful bookings, reduces guest frustration, and improves first impressions during the booking stage.
recommendations.evidence: "Booking app instability and unresponsive phone support lead to missed appointment opportunities."

recommendations.recommendation: Establish a rapid response protocol for in-room maintenance requests, including a 30-minute resolution target for critical issues like AC failure.
recommendations.expected_impact: Minimizes downtime for essential amenities, increases guest trust in hotel responsiveness.
recommendations.evidence: "Maintenance failed to resolve the AC issue, leading to discomfort and poor sleep."

recommendations.recommendation: Conduct a root cause analysis for 'Issue group 1' by reviewing all related guest feedback and mapping the guest journey to identify and address underlying problems.
recommendations.expected_impact: Clarifies unknown pain points, enabling targeted improvements and reducing recurring complaints.

recommendations.recommendation: Provide staff training on empathetic communication and problem-solving for both booking and in-room issues, ensuring guests feel heard and supported.
recommendations.pain_point_addressed: Broken air conditioning, Difficult appointment booking
recommendations.expected_impact: Enhances guest satisfaction by improving service recovery and overall experience.
recommendations.evidence: "Maintenance failed to resolve the AC issue, leading to discomfort and poor sleep." and "Booking app instability and unresponsive phone support lead to missed appointment opportunities."

evaluation.critique: Evaluation parse error, approving by default.
